content.en:
Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian used these eight wisps of primordial black qi plus a large number of life white stones to impact the eighth shackle chain.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally succeeded in breaking the eighth shackle chain.

"There is only one left, and I can break the shackles and become a Ten Realm-level master!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to cultivate, while other Eternal Masters were once again hit by the Primordial Black Qi and came to Ye Tian to help deal with it.

Although Ye Tian's body didn't have time to deal with it, the body also had a will clone, so it could also be dealt with.

In this way, there were a few more wisps of primordial black gas.

Ye Tian continued to cultivate, and before he knew it, another million realm river years had passed.

It has to be said that the ninth shackle chain is too difficult to break.

Even if Ye Tian had the assistance of Primordial Black Qi, it would take a long time, and one can imagine how many cursed black stones and how many years it would take for other Eternal Masters to break the ninth shackle chain.

"Sure enough, Master Venerable is right, the first Black Emperor Ancestor who discovered the path of shackles and chains, it was very easy for him to break the shackles and chains, but after that, the other eternal masters wanted to continue to break it, and the difficulty increased by dozens or even hundreds of times!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he has the aid of primitive black qi, and the effect is not much slower.

"And I'm about to break the ninth chain!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally broke it when he hit the ninth shackle chain.

Click!

The ninth shackle chain broke, turning into golden energy and pouring into Ye Tian's primordial-level control body, causing Ye Tian's primordial-level control body to skyrocket again.

And this section directly triggered the transformation of Ye Tian's strength realm.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's shackles to the Ten Realms level controller were shattered.

At the same time, Ye Tian began to frantically swallow the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, and at the same time, he also used the Primal Spirit Spring Liquid to offset the assimilation of the origin of the Origin Realm Sea to the body.

This time it was a breakthrough to absorb the origin energy, so the speed of absorption was thousands of times faster than before, tens of thousands of times, and the terrifying origin energy caused a tide, and it was swallowed by Ye Tian's body.

......

Wanyuan Mountain.

The Ten Elements Ancestor noticed Ye Tian's breakthrough, and his gaze looked through the layers of time and space.

"My five disciples have actually broken through to the Ten Realms level, and they still haven't used the path of opening up the Boundary River. Even the Black Emperor Ancestor had broken through to the Ten Realms level controller with the help of the Boundary River. He should be the first person to break through to the Ten Realms without the help of the Boundary River!" "The Ten Elements Ancestor muttered.

Ye Tian's breakthrough movement was too great, affecting the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, so many controllers above the Tenth Realm could spy on a little information.

They all knew that Ye Tian had broken through, and they were immediately shocked.

Boundary River No. 89.

The Snow Maiden Controller was shocked when he learned that Ye Tian had broken through to the Ten Realms Controller.

"Little junior brother has broken through, this speed is too fast, and he hasn't opened up the boundary river yet!" said the Snow Maiden in control.

But soon, she guessed the reason.

Shackles and chains!

Obviously, her little junior disciple had at least broken the nine shackles and chains, and only then could she break through to the realm of the Ten Realms level controller.

And she just broke the two shackles and chains, in comparison, her little junior brother completely crushed her on the road of breaking through the shackles and chains!

The Black Decay Controller and the Ancient Demon Controller were also surprised by the breakthrough speed of their little junior brother, it was simply too fast!

"Little junior brother broke through?"

Senior Brother Jiang You was shocked.

I remember that it wasn't a long time ago that this junior junior brother asked him for advice, and then the junior junior brother broke through to the Nine Realms level master, and he didn't feel anything yet.

But in the blink of an eye, the little junior brother broke through to the Ten Realms level master, which is too exaggerated!

"However, I also have the hope of becoming a Ten Realms level master, not long ago, Master Zun finally used a treasure to give birth to a primordial-level mastery body, although it was a defective primordial-level mastery body, which was forcibly spawned by using a treasure. But I can also take the path of shackles and chains, and by breaking the shackles and chains, I can increase my strength to the extreme of the Nine Realm-level Controllers, and then impact the Ten Realm-level Controllers realm!"

Jiang You muttered.

Immediately, he continued his penance.

And his will clone is also looking for cursed blackstones in the Blackstone Domain, striving to find enough cursed blackstones as soon as possible to break the shackles and chains for him.

Time flickered, and after a period of time, Ye Tian completely stabilized the strength of the Ten Realm-level controllers.

"Very strong, much stronger than the Nine Realms level controllers!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Finally, he has also reached this level, ranking at the peak level of the Eternal Master, and is in the same realm as the Ancient Demon Master, the Black Decay Master, and the Snow Maiden Master.

Even, he saw the hope of reaching the level of the master.

Soon after.

Ye Tian held a celebration party to celebrate his breakthrough to the Ten Realms level master, just like the Snow Maiden controller celebrated at the beginning, but he only invited some eternal masters he was familiar with.

The celebration was only held for a short time and ended.

And the news that Ye Tian had broken through to the Ten Realm-level Controllers naturally spread completely, and everyone knew very well that another Ten Realm-level Controllers had been born in the Origin Realm Sea.

What's more, the two Ten Realm-level controllers in succession were all from the Ten Elements Ancestor, which made the Ten Elements Ancestor very proud.

At the level of the Ten Elements Ancestor, there is no hope for upward progress, so he pursues a little in other aspects, such as accepting disciples, so the disciples compete for energy, and the Ten Elements Ancestor as a master is naturally happy.

......

"I have broken through to the Ten Realms level master, I can open up the Boundary River to try, this is also a way to improve my strength, no need to use it in vain!" Ye Tian muttered.

So he spent some time preparing, and after millions of years of Boundary Rivers, everything was ready, and he came to the end of the Origin Realm overseas, and chose an area to open up the Boundary River.

For Ye Tian to open up the boundary river, the Snow Maiden Controller, the Ancient Demon Controller, and the Black Decay Controller and others all came to observe, but this time there was no need to protect Ye Tian.

After all, Ye Tian was already a Ten Realm-level controller, and this time he opened up the Boundary River, there was no possibility of failure, and he was not afraid of being disturbed by others.

All distractions don't make any sense.

After getting ready, Ye Tian began to arrange the magic circle, enveloping an area and turning it into a boundary river area.

After that, he opened up and broke the barrier of the Origin Realm River, channeled the energy of the Origin Realm Sea to descend here, turned into the Boundary River, and then suppressed the Boundary River Void with his Endless Dao Origin, and derived the Origin of the Boundary River......

Everything worked very smoothly, there were no accidents, and Ye Tian was also very relaxed, this is after breaking through to the Ten Realms level master, it will be so easy to open up the Boundary River.

After a long time, this ninetieth boundary river was finally successfully opened up by Ye Tian.

......
